blocks.heading: Services
body: A full service film and video production studio across Egypt and MENA. Choose a service below or send your brief and we will recommend the right setup.

blocks.heading: Photography
body: Premium photography for brands, products, executives, and events with clean lighting and consistent delivery.

blocks.heading: Commercial Advertising Production
body: High impact commercials and campaign films from concept to filming and final delivery.

blocks.heading: Post Production and Final Delivery
body: Editing, color, sound, mastering, and multi format versions that meet platform and broadcast specs.

blocks.heading: Event Coverage and Live Production
body: Multi camera coverage, live streaming, drone, and same day edits for conferences, launches, and concerts.

blocks.heading: Documentary Production
body: Research led documentaries and doc series built for platforms, broadcasters, and institutions.

blocks.heading: On Ground Production Services in Egypt
body: Permits, fixing, crew, gear, logistics, and location scouting for international shoots across Egypt.

blocks.heading: Podcast Production
body: Audio and video podcast production with studio or on location setup, editing, and clips for distribution.

blocks.heading: Corporate and Industrial Content
body: Clear, credible corporate films for oil and gas, education, real estate, and complex industries.

blocks.heading: TV Shows and Live Broadcast Production
body: Studio and field production with control room workflow, run downs, graphics packages, and delivery.

blocks.heading: Motion CGI and AI Powered Visuals
body: 2D motion, 3D, CGI, and AI assisted visuals to elevate storytelling and explain complex ideas.

blocks.heading: Dubbing Voice Over and Localization
body: Subtitles, voice over, dubbing, ADR, and multi language packaging aligned with delivery standards.

blocks.heading: Marketing Solutions and Performance
body: Content strategy, media buying, creative testing, and campaign systems built around production.

blocks.heading: Get a Quote
body: Send your brief and we will respond with the right plan and next steps.
